title: centunculus pentandrus var. distans
intro: Centunculus pentandrus var. distans, also known as Sea Bladder or Sea Chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sea Bladder include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting skin health by treating acne and wounds. The herbal preparations of Centunculus pentandrus var. distans include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
